title: TSK-0152: MoveTo source investigation — find where MoveTo enters build plan pipeline
description:
## Background
TSK-0121 was marked "Reopened — fix didn't hold". DecomposeBuild creative path doesn't add MoveTo, but plan summaries show `[MoveTo → PlaceBlockx215 → GetStatus]`. Temporary trace logging was added in Sprint 52 to both DecomposeBuild (stderr) and BuildGoalDecomposer (ILogger).

## Investigation Steps
1. Run the bot in creative mode with "build a house"
2. Check stderr for `[HtnTaskLibrary] DecomposeBuild returning N actions: [...]` — should show NO MoveTo
3. Check logs for `[BuildGoalDecomposer] DecomposeBuild returned N actions: [...]` — should also show NO MoveTo
4. If MoveTo appears in plan summary but not in trace logs, the injection is happening outside the planner (AgentBackgroundService dispatch loop or context preservation)
5. Check `PlannerRouter.ReplanAsync` → `DecomposerPlanner.ReplanAsync` path — this calls `decomposer.Decompose(goalToDecompose, context.State)` directly, without going through DecomposeBuild

## Files to Check
- `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/BuildGoalDecomposer.cs`
- `Agent.Planning/HtnTaskLibrary.cs` (DecomposeBuild, EmitBuildPlacementLoop)
- `Agent.Planning/Router/PlannerRouter.cs` (DecomposerPlanner.ReplanAsync)
- `WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs` (dispatch loop, context preservation)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] MoveTo no longer appears in creative build plans
- [ ] Plan summary shows `[PlaceBlockxN → GetStatus]` (no MoveTo prefix)
- [ ] No trace logs contradict the plan summary
